text: Amazon AppFlow @ sttt © s ¢ Fully-Managed Integration service * Exchange data between applications (connectors) using flows ¢ Sync data across applications e Aggregate data from different sources ¢ Public Endpoints, but works with PrivateLink (privacy) ¢ AppFlow Custom Connector SDK (build your own) ¢ e.g. Contact records from Salesforce => Redshift ¢ e.g. Support Tickets from Zendesk => S3
